insights:
DeepSeek V4 Flash is the single best deal available today. Priced at just $0.06 per million tokens, it delivers an intelligence score of 40 out of 60—competitive for most production workloads—alongside a value score of 666.7 that far outstrips all other models. It supports a 1000K context window, generates 102 tokens per second, and offers a balanced mix of capability and cost that makes it the default choice for any cost-conscious developer.

Notable runners-up include MiMo-V2-Flash and inclusionAI Ling-2.6-flash, both at the same $0.06/1M price point. MiMo-V2-Flash trades intelligence (25/60) and a smaller 256K context for identical pricing, making it suitable only for very simple tasks. Ling-2.6-flash is even less intelligent (14/60) but extremely fast at 168 t/s, good for high-throughput scenarios where accuracy is secondary. For those needing higher intelligence, DeepSeek V4 Pro ($0.18/1M) scores 44/60 but drops to 59 t/s and carries a triple cost penalty; MiniMax M3 ($0.22/1M) matches that intelligence and adds the highest code Elo (1496) but at a higher per-token expense. Each runner-up addresses a niche, but none beat the Flash on overall value.

For the most common use case—cost-sensitive API calls in production—the clear recommendation is to deploy DeepSeek V4 Flash as your primary model. Its combination of acceptable intelligence, massive context, low latency, and rock-bottom price per token means you can handle the vast majority of queries without incurring unnecessary expense. Reserve higher-priced models like DeepSeek V4 Pro or MiniMax M3 only for tasks that demonstrably require their extra capability, such as complex reasoning or high-stakes code generation.
